title: [Nyessem, Maivaldius Museum]
description: The room is so dark that the walls to either side are hard to make out.  At the room's far end, a gem and stone relief of an elegant woman rises, lit by a pale gold spotlight in the ceiling.  The most prominent feature of this relief is the rune-etched diamond set in the subject's forehead.  Some wide stone benches are set in the middle of the room, with a large metal sign and some lanterns adjacent.
